title: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple
tagline: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple (பொன்னூர் ஆபத்சகாயேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ponnur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple (பொன்னூர் ஆபத்சகாயேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Ponnur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tiru Anniyur. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Abathsahayeswarar.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Korukkai
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Gnanambigai.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai block
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai block is a revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 54 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai taluk
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai taluk is a taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the district is the town of Mayiladuthurai and villages include Agarakkirangudi, Elanthangudi and Mozhaiyur.

topPlaces.name: Koranad
topPlaces.description: Koranad (formerly known as Koorainadu ) is an affluent commercial and residential neighbourhood in Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is surrounded by Kamarajar colony in the North, Dharmapuram in the East, Srinivasapuram in the South, and Sithkarkadu and Sholampettai in the West.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai dry fish market
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai dry fish market, also known as the Karuvattu Sandhai or Mayavaram Karuvattu Sandhai, is a dedicated dry fish market operating in town Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Parimala Ranganatha Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Parimala Ranganathar Perumal Temples or Tiruindaloor is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, located in Thiruvilandur of Mayiladuthurai, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered in Nalayira Divya Prabandham by the 12 poet saints, or the Alvars.

topPlaces.name: Koorainadu Punukeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Koorainadu Punukeeswarar Temple, or simply Punukeeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple located in Koorainadu (also known as Koranad) in the town of Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Punukeeswarar, a form of Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) is a Special Grade Municipality and the district headquarters of Mayiladuthurai district in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is located 256 km (159 mi) from the state capital, Chennai.

items.note: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Korukkai Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Korukkai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Gnanambigai.
Mayiladuthurai block is a revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 54 panchayat villages in this block.

Mayiladuthurai taluk is a taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the district is the town of Mayiladuthurai and villages include Agarakkirangudi, Elanthangudi and Mozhaiyur.

Koranad (formerly known as Koorainadu ) is an affluent commercial and residential neighbourhood in Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is surrounded by Kamarajar colony in the North, Dharmapuram in the East, Srinivasapuram in the South, and Sithkarkadu and Sholampettai in the West.
Mayiladuthurai dry fish market, also known as the Karuvattu Sandhai or Mayavaram Karuvattu Sandhai, is a dedicated dry fish market operating in town Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India.

Parimala Ranganathar Perumal Temples or Tiruindaloor is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu, located in Thiruvilandur of Mayiladuthurai, a town in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered in Nalayira Divya Prabandham by the 12 poet saints, or the Alvars.

Koorainadu Punukeeswarar Temple, or simply Punukeeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple located in Koorainadu (also known as Koranad) in the town of Mayiladuthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Punukeeswarar, a form of Shiva.

Mayiladuthurai (formerly known as Mayavaram or Mayuram) is a Special Grade Municipality and the district headquarters of Mayiladuthurai district in Tamil Nadu, India. The town is located 256 km (159 mi) from the state capital, Chennai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (106 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Anniyur Abathsahayeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Veerateeswarar Temple, Korukkai, Mayiladuthurai block, Mayiladuthurai taluk, Koranad, Mayiladuthurai dry fish market.
